hotspots.title: Protected endpoint authorization gate is a multi-responsibility hotspot
hotspots.risk: Mixed responsibilities and repeated branching raise semantic-regression risk when extending protected endpoint coverage.
hotspots.recommendedAction: Introduce characterization-first decomposition with stable facade and focused collaborators.
hotspots.resolutionNotes: Decision factory, tenant mismatch policy, authorization logger, permission evaluator, and scope evaluation service were extracted. Public gate facade and outcome semantics remain unchanged.

hotspots.title: EngineeringWorkflowController partial shell is oversized
responsibilities: Tenant-scoped read branching and failure mapping
hotspots.risk: Large partial shell increases coupling between API adapters and application orchestration.
hotspots.recommendedAction: Freeze response behavior first, then split adapter responsibilities from orchestration helpers.
hotspots.resolutionNotes: P8-03D characterized route/action/status/response behavior, P8-03E migrated workflow helpers to module namespace, and P8-03F extracted main-shell validate/prepare orchestration into API adapter collaborator while preserving characterization outcomes.

hotspots.title: Workflow submission service mixes idempotency, replay, and orchestration concerns
hotspots.risk: High branching complexity reduces local testability and increases change risk.
hotspots.recommendedAction: Split replay/idempotency orchestration into dedicated collaborators behind stable service contract.
hotspots.resolutionNotes: Service moved into EngineeringWorkflow module application namespace with API composition adapters; behavior remains characterization-locked.

hotspots.title: Workflow state builder concentrates large transformation pipeline
hotspots.risk: Single-class composition path is hard to evolve safely and complicates boundary ownership.
hotspots.recommendedAction: Extract focused state assembly collaborators while preserving output structure and semantics.
hotspots.resolutionNotes: State builder moved into EngineeringWorkflow module application namespace while preserving output/status semantics.

hotspots.title: Workflow diagnostics service remains broad despite boundary migration
hotspots.risk: Wide helper responsibility can still increase change risk even after boundary migration.
hotspots.recommendedAction: Keep behavior locked and split focused collaborators in P8-03F or later, if needed.
hotspots.resolutionNotes: Diagnostics helper moved into EngineeringWorkflow module application namespace; behavioral decomposition deferred.

decompositionCandidates.responsibility: Principal permission checks and protection requirement preconditions
decompositionCandidates.risk: Incorrect extraction order may alter denial precedence.

decompositionCandidates.responsibility: Resource scope resolution and tenant policy evaluation
decompositionCandidates.risk: Scope fallback precedence must remain identical.

decompositionCandidates.responsibility: Decision object creation and outcome mapping helpers
decompositionCandidates.risk: Decision default path drift may affect anti-enumeration behavior.
Log shape drift can reduce auditability.

decompositionCandidates.responsibility: Forbidden vs NotFound mapping for tenant mismatch
decompositionCandidates.risk: Anti-enumeration semantics regression if options precedence changes.

decompositionCandidates.responsibility: Route adapter orchestration currently mixed with validation and mapping details
decompositionCandidates.risk: Response contract drift if extraction changes error mapping.

decompositionCandidates.responsibility: Post-migration helper decomposition and controller-shell decoupling for module-owned orchestration services
decompositionCandidates.risk: Composition-root registration drift during namespace/path relocation.

proposedStages.title: ProtectedEndpointAuthorizationGate characterization tests
proposedStages.scope: Freeze decision/status matrix without production behavior changes.

proposedStages.title: Extract decision factory/logger/tenant mismatch policy
proposedStages.scope: Internal refactor only with stable gate facade.

proposedStages.title: Extract permission/scope evaluation collaborators
proposedStages.scope: Internal refactor only with unchanged route protection semantics.

proposedStages.title: Workflow API shell characterization tests
proposedStages.scope: Freeze controller response behavior before controller/service decomposition.

proposedStages.title: Workflow orchestration helper migration
proposedStages.scope: Move safe orchestration helpers from API namespace to EngineeringWorkflow module.

proposedStages.title: EngineeringWorkflowController partial shell reduction
proposedStages.scope: Reduce controller shell size with stable route/action signatures.

nonClaims: No public API route change claim.
No global EF query filter claim.
